phases.description: Initialize project with Node.js, install Express.js and set up project structure.
Develop API endpoints for tasks: POST /tasks, GET /tasks, DELETE /tasks/:id utilizing Express and SQLite.
Develop unit and integration tests for API endpoints to ensure all acceptance criteria are met.
Deploy the API on a local or cloud server, ensure it runs correctly under typical loads.

top_risks.risk: Unknown server deployment specifics may introduce configuration delays.
top_risks.mitigation: Document server requirements clearly and plan time for configuration.

top_risks.risk: Potential performance issues with SQLite under higher-than-expected load.
top_risks.mitigation: Perform load testing and monitor performance, optimize queries if needed.

estimate.summary: The effort estimate for implementing the Todo List API is moderate, with the core logic phase as the biggest cost driver due to endpoint and database CRUD operations. The main assumption is the SQLite database will handle the data load efficiently without performance degradation.
